title: A Family Discussion About Sports
article_text: My wife and I particularly enjoy watching sports on TV. We always prepare some food and drinks before a game. Sometimes we discuss the players and their skills. My wife's response is always a big laugh when I compare the players. I can hear her voice from the kitchen when the team scores. A piece of fruit is a good snack for the game. After the game, we finish our snacks and clean up. I suppose we can apply this fun idea to other sports too. The president of the local sports club sometimes visits our store. Poor knowledge of the rules can cause a fire of arguments in our court.

sentences.en: My wife and I particularly enjoy watching sports on TV.
sentences.zh: 我和妻子特别喜欢在电视上看体育节目。

words.eng_def: a game or activity people play for fun or exercise

sentences.en: We always prepare some food and drinks before a game.
sentences.zh: 我们总是在比赛前准备一些食物和饮料。

sentences.en: Sometimes we discuss the players and their skills.
sentences.zh: 有时我们会讨论球员和他们的技术。

words.eng_def: to talk about something with other people

sentences.en: My wife's response is always a big laugh when I compare the players.
sentences.zh: 当我比较球员时，我妻子的反应总是大笑。

words.eng_def: to make sounds because something is funny
to look at how things are the same or different

sentences.en: I can hear her voice from the kitchen when the team scores.
sentences.zh: 当球队得分时，我能从厨房听到她的声音。

words.eng_def: the sound you make when you speak or sing

sentences.en: A piece of fruit is a good snack for the game.
sentences.zh: 一块水果是比赛的好零食。

sentences.en: After the game, we finish our snacks and clean up.
sentences.zh: 比赛结束后，我们吃完零食并打扫干净。

words.eng_def: to come to the end of something

sentences.en: I suppose we can apply this fun idea to other sports too.
sentences.zh: 我想我们可以把这个有趣的想法也应用到其他运动上。

words.eng_def: to think that something is true
to use something for a purpose

sentences.en: The president of the local sports club sometimes visits our store.
sentences.zh: 当地体育俱乐部的主席有时会来我们的商店。

words.eng_def: the leader of a group or country
a place where you can buy things

sentences.en: Poor knowledge of the rules can cause a fire of arguments in our court.
sentences.zh: 对规则了解不足会在我们的球场引发激烈的争论。

words.eng_def: a place where you play tennis or basketball; a place for law

a woman who is married

vocabulary.example: Can I have a piece of cake?

vocabulary.eng_def: to come to the end of something
vocabulary.example: I finish my homework at 8 o'clock.

vocabulary.eng_def: to think that something is true
to use something for a purpose
vocabulary.example: You can apply this rule here.

vocabulary.eng_def: the leader of a group or country
hot bright flames; strong emotion
to look at how things are the same or different
a place where you play tennis or basketball; a place for law
people who make sure laws are followed
a place where you can buy things
vocabulary.example: I go to the store for milk.

vocabulary.eng_def: not good; having little money
what you know about something
vocabulary.example: She has good knowledge of English.

vocabulary.eng_def: to make sounds because something is funny

quiz.question_cn: 哪个词的意思是“特别地”？

quiz.question_en: What is the Chinese meaning of 'discuss'?
Which word means 'an answer or reaction'?
Which word means 'what you know about something'?

image_prompts: A man and his wife sitting on a couch watching sports on TV, smiling.
A table with snacks and drinks being prepared before a game.
Two people talking animatedly about basketball players.
A woman laughing while a man points at two players on TV.
A woman in a kitchen calling out to the living room during a game.
A hand holding a piece of apple on a plate.
A couple cleaning up empty plates and cups after a game.
A man thinking with a lightbulb above his head, pointing at a TV showing different sports.
A friendly man in a suit entering a small sports store.
People arguing on a basketball court, with a 'rules' sign nearby.
A police car parked near a store.
A poor child watching sports on a small TV.
